era: 2005-2011. Hip-Hop. E=5 -- conscious duo rap. RA Scion (MC) + Sabzi (producer). Mass Line Media. RETURN from degree 101. Later period: Tobacco Road (2009), The Winter's End (2011). Rainier Valley enters. Sabzi's 5th engine entry (99, 101, 122, 140, 145). Twelfth degree in the hip-hop era (134-145).

location.formative: RA Scion based in Rainier Valley. Sabzi (Iranian-American) based in Seattle. Duo formed in early 2000s. The Rainier Valley connection grounds the later Common Market work in Southeast Seattle's diverse, working-class community.
location.career: Common Market. Conscious hip-hop duo. Three albums: Common Market (debut), Tobacco Road (2009), The Winter's End (2011). Mass Line Media. RA Scion's dense lyricism + Sabzi's melodic production.

members.name: RA Scion (Ryan Abeo)
members.note: Dense, multisyllabic, politically conscious. Rainier Valley roots. Activist, educator, spoken-word performer.

members.name: Sabzi (Saba Mohajerjasbi)
members.note: 5th engine entry (99, 101, 122, 140, 145). Most-documented producer. Melodic, sample-based, jazz/soul/world influences.

associated_musicians.name: Blue Scholars
associated_musicians.note: Geo (MC) + Sabzi (producer). The Blue Scholars/Common Market axis represents Sabzi's two primary partnerships.

associated_musicians.name: Gabriel Teodros
associated_musicians.note: Ethiopian-American MC from Rainier Valley. Deepens the neighborhood at degree 148.

associated_musicians.name: Shabazz Palaces
associated_musicians.note: Ishmael Butler. Frequent collaborators in Seattle's interconnected hip-hop ecosystem.

theory_nodes.concept: Rainier Valley enters -- new neighborhood; one of the most diverse zip codes in America; Ethiopian, Somali, Vietnamese, Filipino, Latino, African-American communities; a second geographic node after the Central District
examples: Rainier Valley: Southeast Seattle, diverse working-class neighborhood.
RA Scion based in the Valley. Community engagement, activism.
Gabriel Teodros (148) deepens the Valley. Ethiopian diaspora.
theory_nodes.description: Rainier Valley enters. New neighborhood. Diverse, immigrant-rich.

genealogy.relationship: Common Market at 145. Rainier Valley introduced.

theory_nodes.concept: Sabzi five-entry arc -- 5 appearances across 46 degrees (99-145); most-documented producer; Blue Scholars (99, 122), Common Market (101, 145), solo DJ (140)
examples: 46-degree span (99-145). Most appearances by any producer.
Sonic thread: melodic, sample-based, jazz-influenced boom-bap.

genealogy.relationship: Common Market return at 145. Sabzi's 5th entry.

theory_nodes.concept: Return entry pattern -- Common Market returns after 44 degrees (101 to 145); debut vs. later period; deeper lyricism, richer production, new geographic anchor; the return deepens rather than repeats
examples: 101: Common Market debut. Early sound. Formation story.
145: Common Market return. Later period. Tobacco Road. Winter's End.
44-degree gap. Same duo, evolved artistry, new neighborhood.
Return pattern: the engine revisits to deepen, not repeat.
theory_nodes.description: Return entry. 44-degree gap. Deeper, not repetitive.

cross_references.relationship: RETURN! 44-degree gap. Debut at 101 covered formation and first album. Return at 145 covers later period, Rainier Valley, evolved sound.
SABZI ARC! 5th appearance. Producer (99, 101, 122) to DJ (140) to producer (145). Five entries across 46 degrees (99-145).
PREVIOUS DEGREE! Jazz Rap (144) to conscious duo rap (145). Genre variation within the hip-hop era.
RAINIER VALLEY! Teodros deepens the Rainier Valley at 148. Ethiopian diaspora. Same neighborhood, three degrees later.
